name: canvas-parent-mcp
description: Canvas LMS (Instructure) MCP — student/observer read access with optional file download. Auth via fetchproxy extension, token, OAuth, or username/password.

canvas_base_url.title: Canvas base URL (https://...)
canvas_base_url.description: Canvas instance base URL, e.g. https://cms.instructure.com

canvas_username.title: Username / login email (legacy)
canvas_username.description: Canvas username (or login email). Pair with the password below for session-scrape auth. Direct Canvas accounts only — no SAML/Google/Microsoft SSO or 2FA. Prefer the fetchproxy extension for zero-config sign-in.

canvas_password.title: Password (legacy)
canvas_password.description: Canvas password. Required only when using username/password session-scrape. Stored locally in the bundle config — keep it private.

canvas_token.title: Personal access token (advanced)
canvas_token.description: Canvas personal access token. Generate via Account → Settings → '+ New Access Token'. Most institutions have disabled this for non-admins; prefer username+password if you have direct Canvas auth.

canvas_client_id.title: OAuth client ID (advanced)
canvas_client_id.description: Canvas Developer Key client ID. Required only if you're using the OAuth refresh-token mode — typically when SSO blocks the username/password flow. Bootstrap via canvas-parent-mcp-qr-login.

canvas_client_secret.title: OAuth client secret (advanced)
canvas_client_secret.description: Canvas Developer Key client secret. Required only if you're using the OAuth refresh-token mode.

canvas_refresh_token.title: OAuth refresh token (advanced)
canvas_refresh_token.description: Canvas OAuth refresh token (bootstrap with canvas-parent-mcp-qr-login). Required only if using OAuth mode.

canvas_name.title: Display name (optional)
canvas_name.description: Friendly name for the Canvas instance (e.g. "CMS"). Defaults to the host portion of the base URL.

tools.name: canvas_get_profile
tools.description: Get the logged-in user's Canvas profile

tools.name: canvas_list_observees
tools.description: List students linked to your observer account

tools.name: canvas_list_courses
tools.description: List active courses with grades and term info

tools.name: canvas_get_course
tools.description: Get a single course with syllabus, teachers, and term

tools.name: canvas_list_assignments
tools.description: List a course's assignments with the user's submission

tools.name: canvas_list_missing_submissions
tools.description: List past-due unsubmitted assignments for the user or observee

tools.name: canvas_get_submission
tools.description: Get a single submission with rubric and grader comments

tools.name: canvas_list_recent_submissions
tools.description: List recently graded submissions in a course

tools.name: canvas_list_enrollments
tools.description: List active student enrollments with per-course grades

tools.name: canvas_list_calendar_events
tools.description: List calendar events or assignments across courses or users

tools.name: canvas_list_upcoming_events
tools.description: List the user's upcoming events (next 7 days)

tools.name: canvas_list_planner_items
tools.description: List planner items for the user or a linked observee

tools.name: canvas_list_announcements
tools.description: List announcements across one or more courses

tools.name: canvas_get_conversation
tools.description: Get a full conversation thread with all messages

tools.name: canvas_list_discussion_topics
tools.description: List discussion topics for a course

tools.name: canvas_download_file
tools.description: Download a Canvas file to disk by absolute URL
